title: Baby Backport + Rabbits (26.1)
description: This brings the new baby mobs and rabbits from the 26.1 update.
body:
Need a server for you and your friends? click the image below:

[![](https://cdn.apexminecrafthosting.com/img/theme/apex-hosting-mobile.png)](https://billing.apexminecrafthosting.com/aff.php?aff=16230)

# Baby Backport + Rabbits
This brings the new baby mobs and rabbits from the 26 snapshot 2 to older versions. There will be some difference due to limitations.

![Piglets](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1d2f68548a9443875729cb154c9c88763ef8dc6d.png)

## Differences
- Chickens Wings are slightly higher.
- Fix piglet head being off center.
- Fixed the z-fighting on Pup.
- Rabbits are Smaller to match hitbox.

**Why only to 1.21.2?**
EMF only supports different baby models to adult models from 1.21.2+.

## REQUIREMENTS
**[EMF] Entity Model Features OR Optifine IS REQUIRED FOR THIS TO WORK.**

[https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features)

[https://optifine.net/home](https://optifine.net/home)
